backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Sanctuary type and CRUD operations (add, get by ID, get by day/month/year, get all) stored in an in-memory Map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented game features (new enemy types, playable characters, type extensions) with associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering CSS, hooks, components, utilities, and game logic for the 3D fighting game and calendar app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'Calendar & Sanctuaries App' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that tracks the selected player character type, renders a dynamic header showing the player's name vs 'THE WORLD', and wraps the FightingGame component.
frontend/src/components/Character3D.tsx: 3D character rendering components using React Three Fiber, including UGCharacter with animated body parts, sword mesh, and sword slash effect; supports hit flash, attack, and facing direction.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSelectS: Character selection screen component displaying UG and Yuji as playable options with stat bars, styled cards, selection highlighting, and a confirm button to start the game.
frontend/src/components/FightingGame.tsx: Main game orchestrator component that manages game state, character selection, physics, AI, combat, and level progression for the fighting game. Integrates keyboard controls, game loop, and renders the 3D scene with HUD overlays.
frontend/src/components/GameHUD.tsx: Heads-up display component showing player and enemy health bars with character names, current level, max levels, and score during gameplay.
frontend/src/components/LevelTransitionS: Animated full-screen overlay displayed between levels, showing the stage number and name with fade-in/hold/fade-out phases over ~2.6 seconds before calling onComplete.
frontend/src/components/OnScreenControls: Touch/mouse on-screen button overlay providing movement, jump, punch, kick, gun, and sword action buttons that directly mutate a shared keyboard state ref.
frontend/src/components/ParticleSystem3D: Three.js instanced mesh particle renderer that draws up to 200 particles as alternating sphere flares and elongated box sparks with boosted color saturation and scale-up-then-shrink animation.
frontend/src/components/Scene3D.tsx: 3D scene composition component that renders characters, particles, projectiles, arena floor, and visual effects (muzzle flash, explosions, shockwaves, cursed energy auras) using React Three Fiber.
frontend/src/components/VictoryScreen.ts: Displays a full-screen victory overlay with animated particles, 'VICTORY / SUKUNA DEFEATED' title, final score, and a replay button with fade-in transition.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalendarState.ts: React hook that manages calendar view state (month/year navigation) and computes a 42-day grid of CalendarDay objects including week numbers and today highlighting.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameLoop.ts: React hook that drives a game loop using requestAnimationFrame, calling update with a capped deltaTime and a render function each frame while running is true.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useKeyboardControls.t: React hook that tracks keyboard input for game controls (movement, punch, kick, block, shoot, sword) using a ref-based KeyState object updated via keydown/keyup event listeners.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating Sanctuary data from the ICP backend actor, including helpers to convert between JS Dates and nanosecond bigint timestamps.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for theming, and declares game-specific utility classes and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: Defines all core TypeScript interfaces and constants for the game, including Character, GameState, Particle, Projectile, KeyState, and level/character configuration data.
frontend/src/utils/combatSystem.ts: Implements combat logic including melee hit detection, projectile collision checks, particle spawning for hits/sword slashes, and per-frame updates for particles and projectiles.
frontend/src/utils/enemyAI.ts: Defines enemy AI behavior (approach, attack, retreat, jump) with per-level scaling of speed, damage, and attack cooldown, and exposes an updateEnemyAI function called each frame.
frontend/src/utils/gamePhysics.ts: Provides physics utilities including gravity application, player input movement, arena bounds clamping, attack hitbox calculation, and rectangle overlap detection.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including game-specific fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, glow box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata including version, feature list, and architectural notes for a 3D fighting game with calendar UI features built on top.
